name: Moist Rhubarb Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons light brown sugar (packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together cake flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
3. Stir in the light brown sugar until well combined.
4. In another bowl, mix the egg substitute, yogurt, applesauce, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until the mixture is almost blended.
6. Quickly fold in the coarsely chopped rhubarb until evenly distributed.
7. Pour the batter into a 9-inch-square pan that has been sprayed with non-stick vegetable spray or lined with parchment paper.
8. Sprinkle the remaining 2 tablespoons of light brown sugar evenly over the top of the batter.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the coffee cake to cool before serving.
